patterns.message: AWS access key detected. Use environment variables or AWS credentials file instead.
OpenAI API key detected. Use environment variables instead.
GitHub personal access token detected. Use environment variables instead.
GitHub OAuth token detected. Use environment variables instead.
GitHub user-to-server token detected. Use environment variables instead.
GitHub refresh token detected. Use environment variables instead.
Slack token detected. Use environment variables instead.
Stripe live secret key detected. Use environment variables instead.
Hardcoded password assignment detected. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.
Hardcoded API key assignment detected. Use environment variables instead.
Hardcoded authentication token detected. Use environment variables instead.
Private key detected in source code. Store keys in a secrets manager, never in code.
SQL query uses f-string interpolation, risking SQL injection. Use parameterized queries instead.
SQL query uses string concatenation, risking SQL injection. Use parameterized queries instead.
SQL query uses %-formatting, risking SQL injection. Use parameterized queries instead.
Direct innerHTML assignment detected. Use textContent or a sanitization library to prevent XSS.
dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage detected. Ensure input is sanitized with DOMPurify or equivalent.
document.write() usage detected. This can introduce XSS vulnerabilities. Use DOM manipulation instead.
eval() usage detected. Avoid eval; use safer alternatives like JSON.parse() or ast.literal_eval().
exec() usage detected. Avoid exec; it allows arbitrary code execution.
__import__() usage detected. Use standard import statements for safer module loading.
Hardcoded localhost URL detected. Use environment variables for service endpoints.
Hardcoded IP address detected. Use environment variables or DNS names for service endpoints.
